# Q² Tire









$27.99

Achieve the perfect tire shine with our cutting-edge Q² Tire, the first SiO2-based tire protectant on the market. Unlike conventional tire dressings, our innovative non-sling gel formula delivers long-lasting performance and a natural satin finish that will make your tires look brand new. Its SiO2-based composition ensures durability, making it the best tire shine solution for those who expect nothing but the best for their vehicles.

Hurry up! Sales Ends In

![image](https://i.shgcdn.com/972d6c53-821f-4010-b1aa-d33d09929fff/-/format/auto/-/preview/3000x3000/-/quality/lighter/) 

# DURABLE

Q2 Tire is surprisingly durable. When the tires are properly cleaned and Q2 Tire properly applied you can see weeks of performance out of this tire gel. As part of your complete wheel care product, this provides high-quality care. Its ability to penetrate the pores of the rubber ensure long term performance and a healthy satin look. 

# IMPROVED LOOKS

Q2 Tire does not just create a hydrophobic and self-cleaning finish on the tires, it dramatically improves their looks. If you like a rich satin finish from your tire shine then this is the product for you. 

![image](https://i.shgcdn.com/d75bf89d-2e41-4e8a-918d-7357fb44e4f6/-/format/auto/-/preview/3000x3000/-/quality/lighter/) 

# PRO TIP

The super concentrated, SiO2 infused formula of Q Tire requires a very high level of surface preparation. Make sure you clean the tire with Q M TireCleaner and let it dry. Rub a small amount of the product into the surface and let it dry. 
TIP: To prolong the durability of Q Tire, heat the surface of the tire wall with a heat gun. This will open the micropores of the rubber and allow the product to soak in. A more matte finish and extended durability are the result.
**CONSUMPTION**: 10-15ml / 1 set
**DURABILITY**: >5 washes

# PRO TIP

The super concentrated, SiO2 infused formula of Q Tire requires a very high level of surface preparation. Make sure you clean the tire with Q M TireCleaner and let it dry. Rub a small amount of the product into the surface and let it dry. 
TIP: To prolong the durability of Q Tire, heat the surface of the tire wall with a heat gun. This will open the micropores of the rubber and allow the product to soak in. A more matte finish and extended durability are the result.
**CONSUMPTION**: 10-15ml / 1 set
**DURABILITY**: >5 washes

#### Q²M Tire - Lasting Brilliance for Your Tires

Introducing GYEON Q M Tire, the tire dressing that transcends the ordinary. This advanced formula not only enhances your tires' natural shine but also provides lasting protection against dirt, UV rays, and contaminants. 
Elevate your tire care routine and experience the difference that GYEON Q M Tire's long-lasting brilliance brings to your vehicle.
Your tires deserve attention beyond aesthetics, and GYEON Q M Tire delivers. As you apply this formula, you're not only revitalizing the look of your tires but also forming a barrier that shields against environmental factors. The result? Tires that stay fresher and cleaner for extended periods, reflecting your dedication to excellence.
With GYEON Q M Tire, you're not just dressing your tires; you're investing in their well-being and appearance. Elevate your tire care routine and experience the satisfaction of rolling on tires that turn heads and stand the test of time.
